changeSet.author: Oleksandr Serozhenko
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE data_type_classifications_to_field_classifiers ( id serial, data_type_classification_id integer NOT NULL, field_classifier_id integer DEFAULT NULL,
CONSTRAINT pk_data_type_classifications_to_field_classifiers PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_data_type_classifications_to_field_classifiers_to_data_type_class FOREIGN KEY (data_type_classification_id) REFERENCES data_type_classifications (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_data_type_classifications_to_field_classifiers_to_field_class FOREIGN KEY (field_classifier_id) REFERENCES field_classifiers (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION ); CREATE INDEX i_data_type_classifications_to_field_classifiers_data_type_class ON data_type_classifications_to_field_classifiers (data_type_classification_id); CREATE INDEX i_data_type_classifications_to_field_classifiers_field_class ON data_type_classifications_to_field_classifiers (field_classifier_id);
